sections.paragraph:
verb denom. to radiate, to emit beams, to shine (used of the face of Moses), Exo 34:29, 30 Exo 34:30, 35 Exo 34:35. Absurdly rendered by Aqu. and Vulg. cornuta erat, whence painters represent Moses as having horns.

Hiphil, to bear horns (pr. to put forth, to produce), Psa 69:32.
